recent_excerpts: The Hacker News reports most enterprise AI security tools fail post-demo due to data quality, integration, and cost issues, stalling critical threat detection and response initiatives.
Qualys data shows enterprises deployed over 8 million Chrome patches in 12 months, but Visual C++ and .NET updates are delayed by 30+ days, leaving critical third-party software exposures.
CVE-2025-54987, a critical 9.8 CVSS flaw in Trend Micro Apex One, allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary code via directory traversal in the management console.
